body.text: Numerous improvements have been done to how the site handles metadata. Most of these changes are invisible to users but external sites should now get better data especially from dynamic pages (identities, E.G.Os, encounters, team builds, md plans, and collections). For example, the embed when pasting a link in a Discord message should now properly show the page's title (and part of the body for user made posts) instead of the generic "Identity" or "Team Build" default.
Filters in the identities and E.G.Os pages have also been changed to be persistent.
